tests: repository required CI, Security, Tri-App, Main Verification, and Release Policy checks
risk_notes: TypeScript 6 changes compiler defaults and deprecation handling.
Next route declarations must be generated before standalone tsc execution.
Node ambient types must not exceed the Node 22 production runtime surface.
rollback_steps: Restore package.json, package-lock.json, and tsconfig.json from the parent main commit.
Run npm ci, npm run typecheck, npm test, and npm run build before redeployment.
validation_boundary: GitHub required checks on the pull-request head are authoritative and fail closed.
